packages.name: plan-then-execute
packages.description: Superpowers-inspired pipeline enforcing brainstorm -> plan -> execute -> verify flow. Ensures design is approved before implementation begins and all work is verified before completion.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.description: Automated E2E test discovery, generation, execution, and fix loop for the workflow-control web dashboard (apps/web/) using Playwright Test Agents (Planner/Generator/Healer) via the playwright-test MCP server.

packages.description: Analyzes a pull request by running security scanning and performance testing in parallel, synthesizes findings into a review comment, and posts it to GitHub after human approval.

packages.name: tech-debt-weekly-cleanup
packages.description: Weekly pipeline that scans multiple GitHub repos for TODO/FIXME/HACK via a fast script, triages by severity with a human gate for critical items, then runs a per-item sub-pipeline in parallel (code fix + risk assessment). Failed validations auto-retry. Final report goes to Slack; high-risk changes require Tech Lead approval.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: tech-research
packages.description: General-purpose technology research pipeline. Supports Web3 protocols, open-source tools, commercial products, technical concepts, and architecture decisions. Dynamically adapts research strategy, information sources, and verification methods based on subject type classification.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: tech-research-collector
packages.description: Sub-pipeline for per-target primary source collection. Invoked by tech-research foreach.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: tech-research-writer
packages.description: Sub-pipeline for writing individual tech research deliverables. Invoked by tech-research foreach.

packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: web3-research-writer
packages.description: Sub-pipeline that writes a single research deliverable. Invoked per-item by web3-tech-research foreach.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: web3-tech-research
packages.description: Research-driven pipeline for Web3 protocol selection, competitive analysis, and technical feasibility assessment. Enforces primary-source-first research and independent fact-checking to prevent the "echo chamber" anti-pattern. On-chain verification runs BEFORE content production. Supports two modes: "full" (product optimization with benchmarks, pain points, solution design) and "explore" (greenfield research with lightweight landscape analysis).
packages.author: workflow-control
